New York State College of Home Economics Office of the Registrar records
New York State College of Home Economics. Office of the Registrar
23-11-2701
1.1 cubic feet. 1.1 cubic feet.
1915-1965. Printed Materials, Photographs Graduate student photographs and career information. Collection material in English 2248605
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
November 9, 2009
EAD encoding:
James Zhang, November 9, 2009
Date modified:
RMC Staff, May 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Graduate student photographs and career information.
Cite As:
New York State College of Home Economics Office of the Registrar records, #23-11-2701. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to individual student records restricted to permission of student and office of origin during student's lifetime.
Cornell University -- : Students.
